title: What does pod annotation `io.kubernetes.cri-o.TTY/x: "false"` do?
body:
```console
$ podman generate kube …
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  annotations:
    io.kubernetes.cri-o.TTY/vigorousshannon: "false"
…
```
Please describe what does the annotation `o.kubernetes.cri-o.TTY/x: true`.  I find no documentation for it on cri-o.


```console
$ podman version
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.2.0-dev
API Version:  4.2.0-dev
Go Version:   go1.18.4
Git Commit:   ccbb8e7444423306691f8ec441ed09387718d6e5
Built:        Thu Aug  4 14:05:34 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

comments.body:
This looks like something you added to your pod or container and then podman added it to the kubernetes yaml.

Moving this to a discussion.
